action: Click on the Adobe Photoshop icon on the desktop to open it.
fallback_action: Perform a Google search using Internet Explorer

recipe.steps:
is the first action. The task is to open Adobe Photoshop by clicking its icon on the desktop. The detected bounding boxes show an icon labeled 'Adobe Photoshop Elements' (Box ID 22), which matches the required application. I will click on this icon to open Adobe Photoshop.
Action Description: Click on the Adobe Photoshop Elements icon to open the application.
